entry.title: Transformer, BERT, and GPT
entry.content:
Gentle Introduction to Transformer, BERT and GPT

GPT

minimal example:

The main idea is constructing \(t_i\) 's repr based on \(\{t_0,...,t_{i-1}\}\).

Adding <eos> in front to construct seq and appending <bos> at tail to construct label(essentially a shifting trick), also equiqqed with CausalAttention(essentially a triu mask), we can self-supvervise a whole text in a single path in teacher's force fashion(and multiple texts in a batch fashion).

entry.title: How to Estimate GPU Memory Allocated?
entry.content:
How to Estimate GPU Memory Allocated?

This article wants to answer a centeral question in DL experiments: Given model architecture, optimizer, batch size, GPU type, how to estimate the GPU memory usage?

use model arch, get number of parameters and activations. use optimizer and GPU type, get number of value need to store for each param, and data type for each value

entry.title: Awk Tutorial
entry.content:
Gentle Introduction to Awk and Beyond

Better experiments management calls for better data processing tools, especially those handy to deal with tabular data and logs. During the trip to HZ, I rummaged in my downloaded books and came across The AWK Programming Language, which just fitted in the slot. What is more, The AWK Programming Language 中文翻译项目 remove the barrier of language. Hopefully, this little tutorial would work as a starting point of my blog, a handy awk cheat sheet for day-to-day usage and a nice practice for writing.

The AWK Programming Language is not just about awk; the crucial concepts and ideas are just expressed in awk.

Basic Concepts and One-Liner Examples

Gentle Introduction to Regular Expression
